parameters.name: page_limit
parameters.description: Define how many results will be returned in the response.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: A search term used to query through the disbursement names.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of disbursement statuses to filter by.

parameters.name: created_at_after
parameters.description: Only return disbursements that are created after this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: created_at_before
parameters.description: Only return disbursements that are created before this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD
